title: Jurinella squarrosa
taxonomy: Jurinella squarrosa is classified in the family Oecophoridae, which is a group of moths commonly known as the concealer moths. The genus Jurinella is typically associated with these moths, and Jurinella squarrosa is one of its species. This classification is based on the characteristics and morphology of the moth, such as its wing patterns and body structure. The classification also takes into account its behavior and habits, which are typical of the Oecophoridae family. By classifying Jurinella squarrosa within this family, scientists can better understand its relationships with other moths and its place within the broader taxonomic hierarchy.
